capabilities: Combine stepwise execution with AI prompting to streamline processes and improve decision-making in agent systems.

procedure.action: Execute merge_artifacts by combining outputs from both stepwise execution and AI prompting using a unified data model using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Run validation scripts to ensure merged outputs meet predefined accuracy thresholds, using tools like Pytest or JUnit using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Utilize machine learning models to detect_candidates by analyzing merged data for potential action points using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Execute classification algorithms to classify_results, ensuring results align with expected categories using libraries like scikit-learn by executing the transformation function on each input record; assert output_schema_valid = true and error_count < 1; log transformation_duration_ms.

Log all process steps using structured logging frameworks such as Logstash to maintain traceability and auditability using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

summary: Integrate stepwise execution with AI prompting by merging workflows, validating outputs, detecting candidates, and classifying results to enhance agent execution efficiency.
title: Stepwise Execution with AI Prompting Knowledge Base

failureConditions: Merged outputs are inaccurate due to incompatible data models.
Candidates are not detected due to insufficient training data.

Classification results are misaligned with expected categories; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.
successConditions: Merged outputs pass validation checks with 95% accuracy; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Candidate detection achieves a recall rate of at least 90%; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Classification accuracy exceeds 85% in test scenarios; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
